transformatsionnaya-igra-denezhnyy-magni.title: Transformational Game «Money Magnet»
transformatsionnaya-igra-denezhnyy-magni.shortDescription: Deep work on your money resource and ancestral patterns.
transformatsionnaya-igra-denezhnyy-magni.description: Deep exploration and analysis of your money resource, ancestral programs and a trance practice to transform your relationship with abundance. The full session takes about two hours and is conducted online by appointment.
transformatsionnaya-igra-denezhnyy-magni.fullDescription: Deep exploration and analysis of your money resource, ancestral programs and a trance practice to transform your relationship with abundance. The full session takes about two hours and is conducted online by appointment.

diagnostika-negativa.title: Negative Influence Reading
diagnostika-negativa.shortDescription: When life feels like everything is falling apart and the cause is unclear.
diagnostika-negativa.description: When life feels like everything is falling apart and nothing works despite your efforts — this reading helps explore what may be blocking harmony. Conducted by photo in messenger format; a gentle, confidential insight session.
diagnostika-negativa.fullDescription: When life feels like everything is falling apart and nothing works despite your efforts — this reading helps explore what may be blocking harmony, find a starting point and understand repeating difficulties. Conducted by photo in messenger format.
